***

***

***

Reality mandates that the first term of {b_n} is one, so a_{b_1} corresponds to a_1. The second term of {b_n} is two, so a_{b_2} corresponds to a_2. This pattern continues, with each term of {b_n} serving as an index for the sequence {a_n}.

***

***
